title: melargyra rubra
side_effects: Melargyra rubra can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory problems, particularly in individuals with pre-existing conditions. Ingesting the plant's sap can cause nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea due to its toxic compounds. Prolonged exposure to the plant's oils may also lead to headaches, dizziness, and fatigue. In severe cases, improper use of melargyra rubra can result in anaphylaxis, a life-threatening allergic reaction.
